description: Grafana dashboard for the weather-dashboard Flask app. Import via Dashboards → Import. Requires Prometheus scraping /metrics (see observability/README.md and k8s/servicemonitor.yaml). Panel 1: request rate from weather_http_requests_total. Panel 2: p95 latency from weather_http_request_duration_seconds histogram.

panels.description: Requests per second grouped by route (handler) and HTTP status code. Spikes may mean traffic bursts or errors (4xx/5xx).
panels.title: HTTP request rate

panels.description: 95th percentile response time in seconds — 95% of requests were faster than this line. Useful to spot slowdowns on /api/weather or the home page.
panels.title: HTTP latency p95

title: Weather dashboard (app)
